sprint.name: Segment & Area Data Analysis - Region Queries, Summary Statistics, and Visual Overlays

phases.phase_name: US1: Query Data Within Range Annotations (P1)
US3: Analyse Data in Segmented Series (P2)
US4: Box-Select to Analyse Ad-Hoc Regions (P2)

tasks.title: Red: Failing tests for all foundational data models
tasks.description:
Write failing TDD tests for DataRegion (equality, copyWith, validation of startX<=endX and non-empty id, different sources), DataRegionSource enum, RegionMetric enum with display labels, SeriesRegionSummary (field values, null rules: count<2 → null stdDev/delta, edge cases count=0 and count=1), RegionSummary (per-series map, empty map), RegionSummaryConfig defaults ({min,max,average}, aboveRegion), and RegionSummaryPosition enum.

Test files:
- test/red/unit/models/data_region_test.dart
- test/red/unit/models/region_summary_test.dart

Covers spec tasks: T003, T004, T012, T013, T014

verification.test_strategy: TDD red-phase: verify test files exist in test/red/ directories, compile successfully, contain meaningful assertions, and fail with assertion failures (not compile errors). Each test file must have // @orchestra-task: 1 annotation.
success_criteria: Test file test/red/unit/models/data_region_test.dart exists with // @orchestra-task: 1 annotation
Test file test/red/unit/models/region_summary_test.dart exists with // @orchestra-task: 1 annotation
Tests compile successfully (no syntax/import errors)
Tests contain expect() assertions for DataRegion equality, copyWith, validation
Tests contain expect() assertions for SeriesRegionSummary null rules (stdDev/delta null when count<2)
Tests contain expect() assertions for RegionSummaryConfig defaults
Tests fail with assertion failures (not compile errors) when run

tasks.title: Green: Implement foundational models, enums, typedefs & barrel exports
tasks.description:
Create lib/src/analysis/ directory. Implement:
1. DataRegionSource enum and DataRegion model class with id, label, startX, endX, source, seriesData fields, Equatable equality (by id/startX/endX/source), copyWith, validation (startX<=endX, non-empty id) in lib/src/models/data_region.dart. Document that startX==endX is valid for single-point queries.
2. RegionMetric enum with display labels in lib/src/models/region_summary.dart
3. SeriesRegionSummary model with all statistical fields, Equatable equality, null rules (stdDev/delta null when count<2) in lib/src/models/region_summary.dart
4. RegionSummary model (region + seriesSummaries map) with Equatable in lib/src/models/region_summary.dart
5. RegionSummaryPosition enum and RegionSummaryConfig model (metrics set, valueFormatter, position) with defaults ({min,max,average}, aboveRegion) in lib/src/models/region_summary_config.dart
6. RegionSelectedCallback and CustomRegionAnalysisCallback typedefs in lib/src/models/interaction_callbacks.dart
7. Empty region_analyzer.dart with library doc comment in lib/src/analysis/
8. Barrel exports for all new public types in lib/braven_charts.dart

Make all red-phase tests pass. Promote test files from test/red/ to test/.

Covers spec tasks: T001-T011

verification.test_strategy: TDD green-phase: verify all model files exist, classes implement Equatable correctly, validation works, null rules enforced, barrel exports present, all promoted tests pass, dart analyze clean.
success_criteria: File lib/src/models/data_region.dart exists with DataRegion class and DataRegionSource enum
DataRegion extends Equatable with props [id, startX, endX, source]
DataRegion validates startX <= endX and non-empty id (assertion or ArgumentError)
DataRegion has copyWith method
File lib/src/models/region_summary.dart exists with RegionMetric enum, SeriesRegionSummary, and RegionSummary classes
RegionMetric enum has all 11 values with display labels
SeriesRegionSummary enforces null stdDev/delta when count < 2
File lib/src/models/region_summary_config.dart exists with RegionSummaryConfig and RegionSummaryPosition
RegionSummaryConfig defaults to metrics={min,max,average} and position=aboveRegion
File lib/src/models/interaction_callbacks.dart contains RegionSelectedCallback and CustomRegionAnalysisCallback typedefs
File lib/src/analysis/region_analyzer.dart exists with library doc comment
lib/braven_charts.dart exports data_region.dart, region_summary.dart, region_summary_config.dart, region_analyzer.dart
All promoted model tests pass (flutter test test/unit/models/data_region_test.dart test/unit/models/region_summary_test.dart)
dart analyze reports zero issues for new files

tasks.title: Red: Failing tests for US1 range annotation analysis
tasks.description:
Write failing TDD tests for:
1. RegionAnalyzer.filterPointsInRange() — sorted binary-search path, unsorted linear-scan fallback, inclusive boundaries, empty input, boundary duplicates, single-point match, range outside data
2. RegionAnalyzer.regionFromAnnotation() — builds DataRegion from RangeAnnotation + multi-series data, maps filtered points per series, excludes series with no matches, handles empty series
3. Widget test: chart with 3 series + range annotation spanning X=3.2..7.8, simulate tap on annotation, verify onRegionSelected fires with correct DataRegion (source=rangeAnnotation, correct seriesData per series); assert onAnnotationTap still fires alongside onRegionSelected (both callbacks co-fire per base spec integration contract); verify selectedDataRegions getter returns matching DataRegion after tap
4. Widget test: range annotation covers zero data points → callback fires with empty seriesData; multiple series where only some have data → only matching series included; horizontal-only annotation (null startX/endX) is ignored; single-region selection (FR-005): tap annotation A then B → only B active

Test files:
- test/red/unit/analysis/region_analyzer_test.dart (filter + regionFromAnnotation tests)
- test/red/unit/analysis/annotation_region_widget_test.dart (widget tests)

Covers spec tasks: T015, T016, T022, T023

verification.test_strategy: TDD red-phase: verify test files exist in test/red/, compile, contain meaningful assertions for filter and annotation-tap flows, fail with assertion failures.
success_criteria: Test file test/red/unit/analysis/region_analyzer_test.dart exists with // @orchestra-task: 3
Test file test/red/unit/analysis/annotation_region_widget_test.dart exists with // @orchestra-task: 3
FilterPointsInRange tests cover: sorted path, unsorted fallback, inclusive boundaries, empty input, boundary duplicates, range outside data
RegionFromAnnotation tests cover: multi-series, excludes empty series, handles empty series
Widget tests cover: onRegionSelected fires on annotation tap, co-fires with onAnnotationTap, selectedDataRegions getter, zero-data annotation, horizontal annotation ignored, single-region selection
All tests compile and fail with assertion failures (not compile errors)

tasks.title: Green: Implement US1 range annotation query & callback wiring
tasks.description:
Implement:
1. RegionAnalyzer.filterPointsInRange() with binary search on sorted data (O(log n + k)) and linear-scan fallback. Sorted heuristic: points.first.x <= points.last.x. Inclusive bounds. In lib/src/analysis/region_analyzer.dart
2. RegionAnalyzer.regionFromAnnotation() that builds a DataRegion from a RangeAnnotation and Map<String, List<ChartDataPoint>> series data, filtering each series via filterPointsInRange(). In lib/src/analysis/region_analyzer.dart
3. Add onRegionSelected callback property (RegionSelectedCallback?) to BravenChartPlus widget in lib/src/braven_chart_plus.dart
4. Wire annotation-tap flow: in EventHandlerManager._handleElementTap() (or equivalent), detect RangeAnnotationElement, extract startX/endX, call RegionAnalyzer.regionFromAnnotation(), fire onRegionSelected with resulting DataRegion. Only vertical range annotations with non-null startX and endX qualify. In lib/src/rendering/modules/event_handler_manager.dart + lib/src/braven_chart_plus.dart
5. Add selectedDataRegions getter to BravenChartPlusState that lazily builds List<DataRegion> from current coordinator selection state in lib/src/braven_chart_plus.dart

Promote test files from test/red/ to test/. Make all red-phase tests pass.

Covers spec tasks: T017-T021

verification.test_strategy: TDD green-phase: verify RegionAnalyzer methods work correctly, callback wiring fires onRegionSelected on annotation tap, selectedDataRegions returns correct data, all promoted tests pass.
success_criteria: RegionAnalyzer.filterPointsInRange() uses binary search on sorted data with O(log n + k) complexity
RegionAnalyzer.filterPointsInRange() falls back to linear scan for unsorted data
RegionAnalyzer.regionFromAnnotation() builds DataRegion with source=rangeAnnotation
BravenChartPlus has onRegionSelected callback property (RegionSelectedCallback?)
Annotation tap flow: tapping a vertical RangeAnnotation fires onRegionSelected with DataRegion
onAnnotationTap continues to co-fire alongside onRegionSelected
Horizontal-only annotations do not fire onRegionSelected
selectedDataRegions getter returns lazy List<DataRegion> from coordinator state
Single-region selection: new annotation tap replaces previous selection
All promoted tests pass (flutter test test/unit/analysis/region_analyzer_test.dart test/unit/analysis/annotation_region_widget_test.dart)
dart analyze reports zero issues for modified files

tasks.title: Red: Failing tests for US2 summary statistics computation
tasks.description:
Write failing TDD tests for:
1. RegionAnalyzer.computeSeriesSummary() — correct computation of all metrics (count, min, max, sum, average, range, stdDev, firstY, lastY, delta, duration) for 50-point series, 1-point series (stdDev=null, delta=null), 0-point series (returns null), floating-point precision (within 1e-10)
2. RegionAnalyzer.computeRegionSummary() — multi-series region, omits series with zero data, custom seriesNames/seriesUnits pass-through
3. Widget test: programmatic analysis via GlobalKey<BravenChartPlusState> — select region, call computeRegionSummaries(), verify all metrics match expected values

Test files:
- test/red/unit/analysis/region_analyzer_test.dart (computeSeriesSummary + computeRegionSummary tests — append to existing file from Task 3)
- test/red/unit/analysis/region_summary_widget_test.dart (widget test)

Covers spec tasks: T024, T025, T029

verification.test_strategy: TDD red-phase: verify test files exist in test/red/, compile, contain meaningful assertions for all metric computations, fail with assertion failures.
success_criteria: Test file test/red/unit/analysis/region_analyzer_test.dart exists with // @orchestra-task: 5 (or appended to existing)
Test file test/red/unit/analysis/region_summary_widget_test.dart exists with // @orchestra-task: 5
computeSeriesSummary tests cover: 50-point series with all metrics, 1-point series nulls, 0-point returns null, precision within 1e-10
computeRegionSummary tests cover: multi-series, omits empty series, seriesNames/seriesUnits pass-through
Widget test covers: programmatic computeRegionSummaries() via GlobalKey returns correct values
All tests compile and fail with assertion failures (not compile errors)

tasks.title: Green: Implement US2 summary statistics & widget state method
tasks.description:
Implement:
1. RegionAnalyzer.computeSeriesSummary() that computes count, min, max, sum, average, range, stdDev (population), firstY, lastY, delta, duration from a list of ChartDataPoint. Returns null for empty input. stdDev/delta null when count<2. In lib/src/analysis/region_analyzer.dart
2. RegionAnalyzer.computeRegionSummary() that iterates all series in a DataRegion, calls computeSeriesSummary() per series, returns RegionSummary (omitting empty series). Cache result per region and invalidate on selection change. In lib/src/analysis/region_analyzer.dart
3. Add computeRegionSummaries([List<DataRegion>? regions]) method to BravenChartPlusState that delegates to RegionAnalyzer.computeRegionSummary() for each region (defaults to selectedDataRegions if null). In lib/src/braven_chart_plus.dart

Promote test files from test/red/ to test/. Make all red-phase tests pass.

Covers spec tasks: T026, T027, T028

verification.test_strategy: TDD green-phase: verify all metrics computed correctly to floating-point precision, null rules enforced, caching works, widget method returns correct summaries.
success_criteria: RegionAnalyzer.computeSeriesSummary() computes all 11 metrics correctly
Population standard deviation formula used (not sample)
Returns null for empty input list
stdDev and delta null when count < 2 (FR-015)
Floating-point precision within 1e-10 for computed metrics (SC-004)
RegionAnalyzer.computeRegionSummary() omits series with zero data points
seriesNames and seriesUnits pass through to SeriesRegionSummary
BravenChartPlusState.computeRegionSummaries() delegates correctly, defaults to selectedDataRegions
All promoted tests pass
dart analyze reports zero issues for modified files

tasks.title: Red: Failing tests for US3 segment group detection & tap
tasks.description:

2. RegionAnalyzer.segmentGroupForPoint() — point inside a group returns correct DataRegion, point outside any group returns null, boundary points included
3. Widget test: series with points 0-9 styled blue and 10-19 styled red, tap point 5, verify callback delivers region with points 0-9; tap unstyled point → no segment region callback
4. Widget test: non-adjacent same-style groups (blue 0-4, red 5-9, blue 10-14), tap point 12, verify only points 10-14 returned (contiguity check)

Test files:
- test/red/unit/analysis/region_analyzer_test.dart (detectSegmentGroups + segmentGroupForPoint tests)
- test/red/unit/analysis/segment_region_widget_test.dart (widget tests)

Covers spec tasks: T030, T031, T035, T036

verification.test_strategy: TDD red-phase: verify test files in test/red/, compile, contain assertions for segment group detection and contiguity, fail with assertion failures.

Test file test/red/unit/analysis/segment_region_widget_test.dart exists with // @orchestra-task: 7

segmentGroupForPoint tests cover: inside group, outside group, boundary points

tasks.title: Green: Implement US3 segment group detection & tap wiring
tasks.description:
Implement:
1. RegionAnalyzer.detectSegmentGroups() that iterates List<ChartDataPoint>, groups consecutive non-null SegmentStyle by value equality, returns List<DataRegion> (source=segment) with X-range from group's first/last point. Use ID format 'segment_<seriesId>_<startIndex>' per data-model.md convention. In lib/src/analysis/region_analyzer.dart
2. RegionAnalyzer.segmentGroupForPoint() that finds which segment group contains a given point index, returns DataRegion or null. In lib/src/analysis/region_analyzer.dart
3. Wire segment-tap flow: in point-tap handler, check if tapped ChartDataPoint.segmentStyle != null, call RegionAnalyzer.segmentGroupForPoint(), fire onRegionSelected with the segment group DataRegion (source=segment). Detection logic in lib/src/rendering/modules/event_handler_manager.dart, callback dispatch through BravenChartPlusState. Existing onPointTap continues to co-fire.

Promote test files from test/red/ to test/. Make all red-phase tests pass.

Covers spec tasks: T032, T033, T034

verification.test_strategy: TDD green-phase: verify segment group detection identifies groups by contiguity not just style, tap wiring fires onRegionSelected, all tests pass.
success_criteria: detectSegmentGroups() groups consecutive non-null SegmentStyle by value equality
Non-adjacent groups with same style are treated as separate regions (FR-017)
Segment DataRegion IDs follow format 'segment_<seriesId>_<startIndex>'
segmentGroupForPoint() returns correct DataRegion for point inside group, null for outside
Segment tap fires onRegionSelected with source=segment DataRegion
Unstyled point tap does not fire segment-based onRegionSelected
Existing onPointTap callback continues to co-fire alongside onRegionSelected
All promoted tests pass
dart analyze reports zero issues for modified files

tasks.title: Red: Failing tests for US4 box-select region analysis
tasks.description:
Write failing TDD widget tests for:

Box-select drag from X=2.0 to X=8.0, verify onRegionSelected fires with DataRegion (source=boxSelect) containing correct series data in the X-range; assert callback fires synchronously upon drag completion; assert onSelectionChanged still fires alongside onRegionSelected (both callbacks co-fire per base spec integration contract)
2. Active box-select region is cleared on click elsewhere (callback fires with null); starting a new box-select replaces the previous region; assert only one box-select DataRegion exists at a time (replacement, not accumulation)

Test files:

tasks.title: Green: Implement US4 box-select region flow & clearing
tasks.description:
Implement:
1. Wire box-select flow: in EventHandlerManager._completeBoxSelection() (or equivalent), convert box rect to data-space X-range, build transient DataRegion (source=boxSelect) via RegionAnalyzer.filterPointsInRange(), fire onRegionSelected. Detection logic in lib/src/rendering/modules/event_handler_manager.dart, callback dispatch through BravenChartPlusState.
2. Implement region clearing: on click-elsewhere or new interaction, fire onRegionSelected(null) and clear the transient box-select state. In lib/src/braven_chart_plus.dart
3. Ensure selectedDataRegions getter includes the transient box-select region when active. In lib/src/braven_chart_plus.dart
4. Box-select region callback must fire within 1 frame of drag completion (SC-008).

Promote test files from test/red/ to test/. Make all red-phase tests pass.

Covers spec tasks: T039, T040, T041

verification.test_strategy: TDD green-phase: verify box-select creates transient DataRegion, clearing works, selectedDataRegions includes box-select region, all tests pass.
success_criteria: Box-select completion builds DataRegion with source=boxSelect and correct X-range data

onRegionSelected fires synchronously on drag completion

tasks.title: Green: Implement US5 RegionSummaryRenderer & overlay wiring
tasks.description:
Implement:
1. RegionSummaryRenderer as a stateless const module (matching TooltipRenderer pattern) with paint(Canvas, Size, RegionSummary, RegionSummaryConfig, Rect regionBounds) method that renders a card with metric labels and values, including position calculation (center above region bounds, fall back to inside-top if card would exceed chart area top boundary). In lib/src/rendering/modules/region_summary_renderer.dart
2. Add showRegionSummary (bool, default false) and regionSummaryConfig (RegionSummaryConfig?) properties to BravenChartPlus widget. In lib/src/braven_chart_plus.dart
3. Wire overlay painting: extend _paintOverlayLayer() and _hasActiveOverlayContent() in ChartRenderBox to invoke RegionSummaryRenderer.paint() when showRegionSummary is true and a region is selected. In lib/src/rendering/chart_render_box.dart. Verify series layer cache (_seriesLayerPicture) is NOT invalidated by overlay repaint (FR-013).
4. Add showRegionSummaryOverlay(DataRegion) and hideRegionSummaryOverlay() methods to BravenChartPlusState for programmatic overlay control. Write widget tests verifying overlay is dismissed on region deselection (US5 acceptance #3) and toggling showRegionSummary hides overlay.

Promote test files from test/red/ to test/. Make all red-phase tests pass. Update golden files.

Covers spec tasks: T044, T046, T047, T048

verification.test_strategy: TDD green-phase: verify renderer follows TooltipRenderer pattern, overlay paints in Layer 2 without invalidating series cache, widget properties work, programmatic show/hide works, golden tests match.
success_criteria: File lib/src/rendering/modules/region_summary_renderer.dart exists with RegionSummaryRenderer class
RegionSummaryRenderer is const and stateless (matches TooltipRenderer pattern)
paint() method renders card with metric labels and values from RegionSummaryConfig
Position calculation: center above region, fallback to inside-top when exceeding chart top
BravenChartPlus has showRegionSummary (bool, default false) and regionSummaryConfig properties
_paintOverlayLayer() invokes RegionSummaryRenderer when enabled and region selected
_hasActiveOverlayContent() returns true when region summary is active
Series layer cache (_seriesLayerPicture) is NOT invalidated by overlay repaint (FR-013, SC-007)
showRegionSummaryOverlay() and hideRegionSummaryOverlay() methods work programmatically
Overlay dismissed when region is deselected
All promoted tests and golden tests pass
dart analyze reports zero issues for modified files

tasks.title: Performance benchmarks, edge-case tests & code quality
tasks.description:
1. Write performance benchmark: RegionAnalyzer.filterPointsInRange() with 100k sorted points completes under 10ms (SC-001), computeSeriesSummary() with 1k points completes under 5ms (SC-002); verify no measurable increase in series-layer paint time when hovering/crosshair is active with summary overlay visible. In test/benchmark/region_analysis_benchmark.dart
2. Write edge-case unit tests: region X-range extends beyond data boundaries (returns only actual data per edge case spec), unsorted data fallback produces correct results, duplicate X values at boundary are included, multi-axis series where X values use different scales (filtering uses raw data coordinates per FR-008), analysis of region mid-stream produces correct results. In test/unit/analysis/region_analyzer_test.dart
3. Run dart analyze on all new and modified files — zero issues required for: lib/src/models/data_region.dart, lib/src/models/region_summary.dart, lib/src/models/region_summary_config.dart, lib/src/analysis/region_analyzer.dart, lib/src/rendering/modules/region_summary_renderer.dart
4. Add dartdoc comments with /// examples to all public APIs: DataRegion, RegionAnalyzer, RegionSummary, RegionSummaryConfig, new BravenChartPlus properties

Covers spec tasks: T054, T055, T056, T057

verification.test_strategy: Verify benchmarks exist and pass thresholds, edge-case tests pass, dart analyze clean, dartdoc on all public APIs.
success_criteria: File test/benchmark/region_analysis_benchmark.dart exists with performance tests
filterPointsInRange with 100k points benchmark exists (SC-001 target: <10ms)
computeSeriesSummary with 1k points benchmark exists (SC-002 target: <5ms)
Edge-case tests in test/unit/analysis/region_analyzer_test.dart cover: beyond-boundary, unsorted fallback, boundary duplicates, multi-axis raw coordinates, streaming snapshot
dart analyze reports zero issues for all new/modified files
All public APIs (DataRegion, RegionAnalyzer, RegionSummary, RegionSummaryConfig, BravenChartPlus region properties) have dartdoc /// comments with examples
All edge-case tests pass

tasks.title: Demo page & main.dart navigation integration
tasks.description:
1. Create demo page showing all 3 region sources (annotation tap, segment tap, box-select) with summary overlay enabled. In example/lib/screens/region_analysis_demo.dart
2. Update example/lib/main.dart to include navigation to the region analysis demo page

The demo should showcase:
- A chart with range annotations that trigger onRegionSelected on tap
- A chart with styled segments that trigger segment-group analysis on tap
- A chart with box-select enabled for ad-hoc region analysis
- Summary overlay enabled (showRegionSummary: true) with configured metrics
- Custom analysis callback demonstrating domain-specific metrics
- A sidebar or bottom panel displaying the DataRegion and RegionSummary data from callbacks

Covers spec tasks: T058, T059

verification.test_strategy: Verify demo page exists with all three region sources, navigation entry exists in main.dart, demo compiles and runs.
success_criteria: File example/lib/screens/region_analysis_demo.dart exists
Demo page displays chart with range annotations and onRegionSelected callback
Demo page displays chart with styled segments and segment-tap analysis
Demo page displays chart with box-select for ad-hoc region analysis
Demo page enables showRegionSummary with configured metrics
Demo page includes customRegionAnalysis callback demonstration
example/lib/main.dart has navigation entry for region analysis demo
Demo compiles without errors (dart analyze example/lib/screens/region_analysis_demo.dart)
